name: Patient 25
history: Works with children with learning disabilities. Describes being pampered by parents with minimal consequences earlier in life. Ongoing conflicts with authority figures.
intermediate_belief: Authority figures never listen to my ideas or respect my expertise.
intermediate_belief_depression: My efforts to help students are pointless because the system is against me.
coping_strategies: Persisting with student initiatives despite resistance.
situation: Encouraging students to socialize and participate, with results falling short of expectations.
auto_thought: Nothing I try with these students works. The administration doesn't support me.
behavior: Continue encouraging student participation despite poor results.
